title: Collision
description: Imminent link-object or object-human impact above force/velocity threshold.

title: Tip-over
description: Support polygon / ZMP-style heuristic violation indicating platform instability.

title: Overload
description: Torque, current, or gripper force exceeds the nominal envelope of the actuator.

title: Velocity limit
description: Proposed joint or end-effector velocity exceeds the configured safety cap.
